prompt: Create an ultra-photorealistic extreme close-up portrait focused on the eyes of a young woman with sunlit blonde hair. The composition is a tight horizontal crop showing only the upper half of the face from just above the eyebrows to the bridge and top of the nose, with one side of the face partly framed by loose strands of hair. She has pale blue-gray eyes, natural eyebrows, faint freckles across the nose and cheeks, realistic skin texture, and detailed upper and lower eyelashes with the lower lashes clearly visible but fine and natural. Her expression is calm and neutral, looking directly into the camera. Use warm natural daylight from the left, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, cinematic realism, high-resolution skin detail, natural makeup, slightly tousled hair, and a subtle golden outdoor glow. Aspect ratio should be a wide banner-like crop, approximately 4:1.
